[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A cartoon-style character in a dark coat holds a handgun pointed forward against a plain white background.

Main Subject: The main focus is a person depicted in a stylized illustration, shown from head to boots, holding a handgun with both hands at shoulder level and aiming to the right of the image.

Setting: The background is plain white with no visible environment or scenery, suggesting a cutout or isolated character on a solid backdrop. Lighting is flat and even, consistent with a digital illustration.

Visual Details: The character has short, light brown hair with a side-swept fringe and large, pale eyes. They wear a dark navy or black long coat with gold-toned buttons and trim, a high collar, and structured shoulders; the coat flares outward at the hips. A dark belt with a light-colored buckle wraps at the waist. A pale cuff or shirt edge is visible at the wrists. Their legs are covered in dark tights or stockings, and they wear brown, lace-up boots with darker soles. The handgun is dark with a light gray front part, gripped firmly with the right hand behind it and the left hand supporting underneath or near the front. The pose is slightly angled, with one leg forward and the body leaning subtly as the gun is aimed.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a stylized person aiming a handgun while standing in a confident, forward-leaning pose. The character wears a dark tailored coat, belt, tights, and brown boots on a plain white background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

# Structured Version

- The image appears to be an illustration of a person holding a gun; there are no visible labels, UI elements, or captions to extract text from.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
